channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: West Virginia celebrates the life of NBA great Jerry West at sellout game with No. 2 Iowa State
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia celebrated the life of NBA great Jerry West, the school's all-time leading scorer, at its sellout game Saturday against No. 2 Iowa State.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale’s return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Taylor Swift returns to Arrowhead Stadium to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs play the Texans
item.description: Pop superstar Taylor Swift returned to Arrowhead Stadium to cheer on her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they face the Houston Texans in the divisional round of the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State's WR tandem of Smith, Egbuka eager to see if they will face man coverage from Notre Dame
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Ohio State wide receiver Jeremiah Smith was able to keep a team-first approach after having extra defensive attention make him almost invisible in the Buckeyes' Cotton Bowl win over Texas in the College Football Playoff semifinals.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 2-time Cy Young winner Jacob deGrom feeling normal after missing most of 1st two Texas seasons hurt
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Two-time Cy Young Award winner Jacob deGrom already has thrown off the mound this offseason and said everything felt normal after missing most of his first two seasons with the Texas Rangers because of elbow surgery.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 1 Auburn escapes No. 23 Georgia with 70-68 win
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Tahaad Pettiford hit 5 of 7 shots from 3-point range, scoring 24 off the bench to help No. 1 Auburn escape No. 23 Georgia with a 70-68 win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: RICK FARLOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boise State star Ashton Jeanty becomes underwear model with new partnership
item.description: Boise State star running back Ashton Jeanty talked to Fox News Digital about partnering with SAXX and becoming and underwear model while playing football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys legend DeMarcus Ware says Eagles fan harmed his mother amid controversy over fan who cursed at woman
item.description: Former Dallas Cowboys player DeMarcus Ware told Fox News Digital that he once had to witness Eagles fans hurling dangerous projectiles at his mother.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs fans banking on three-peat during Wild Card Weekend
item.description: The NFL playoffs kicked off on Saturday, but the Kansas City Chiefs have to wait another week for their playoff campaign to start. It’s leaving fans with mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: ESPN announces Hall of Famer Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting after latest cancer battle
item.description: In a span of three-plus years, legendary college basketball broadcaster Dick Vitale battled four types of cancer. Summer 2024 marked his most recent medical procedure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Kelce could call it quits if Chiefs pull off three-peat, ESPN star says
item.description: Travis Kelce has been in the NFL for well over a decade. While he remains productive, his age has prompted discussions about how soon he will walk away from the sport.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC hosts first ever practice
item.description: It was a warm welcome as San Diego FC reported to training camp Sunday, Jan. 12 surrounded by season ticketholders and support groups, taking the practice pitch for the very first time on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: State Farm pulls Super Bowl commercial, shifts focus to supporting L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: State Farm has decided to pull its Super Bowl commercial and instead focus on supporting Los Angeles residents impacted by the deadly wildfires. “Our focus is firmly on providing support to the people of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Murphy and Williamson carry the Pelicans to a 119-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Trey Murphy III scored 32 points and Zion Williamson added 21 as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Cubs not among Roki Sasaki's final 3 teams
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs were among the teams told they were out as the free agency frenzy for Japanese phenom pitcher Roki Sasaki has been narrowed to three clubs, according to a new report.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses third straight, falling at TCU, 71-67
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a funk at the beginning of the Big 12 Conference season. In a back-and-forth battle in Fort Worth, the Cougars fell 71-67 to TCU for its third straight loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
